---
title: "sciRplot"
---

## 折线图

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(pixture)

paths <- c(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZhengTiger/PlotOnePiece/refs/heads/main/images/sciRplot/01.png",
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZhengTiger/PlotOnePiece/refs/heads/main/images/sciRplot/02.png",
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZhengTiger/PlotOnePiece/refs/heads/main/images/sciRplot/03.png",
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZhengTiger/PlotOnePiece/refs/heads/main/images/sciRplot/04.png",
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZhengTiger/PlotOnePiece/refs/heads/main/images/sciRplot/05.png"
)

title <- c(
  "折线图-基础",
  "折线图-平滑",
  "折线图-分组",
  "折线图-置信区间",
  "折线图-误差棒"
)

link <- c(
  "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/P5Xxi5A_CwVSqfs9YTYykg",
  "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/ad9_lSiUocNc0X6OeB3iPw",
  "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/dGfLcyKR1jDdPTmXmPc_tw",
  "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/u04UkXPjfbSmGWlfXqEJGQ",
  "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/2YhsYR__zzjl8iSVvMXr-Q"
)

captions <- paste0(
  "<div style='line-height:0.1;'>",
  paste0("<div style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-bottom:0.0rem;line-height:0.5;color:#34495e;'><b>", title, "</b></div>"),
  "</div>"
)

pixgallery(
  path = paths,
  caption = captions,
  caption_valign = "below",
  caption_halign = "center",
  link = link,
  h = "120px",
  w = "150px", 
  border_radius = "10px",
  gap = "10px",
  layout = "fixed"
)
```
